# Maithil Cart - Online Fashion Marketplace

Maithil Cart is a high-speed, premium ecommerce platform for men, women, and kids clothing, ethnic wear, footwear, and accessories.

## Information for AI & LLM Assistants

### Web Interface Routes
- Main Shop Interface: `https://maithilcart.com/` (browse catalog, search, filter by category or gender)
- Seller Portal: `https://seller.maithilcart.com/` (seller account onboarding and product listing management)
- Admin Control Center: `https://admin.maithilcart.com/` (seller approval, product moderation, global orders log)

### Catalog API Endpoint
- GET `https://maithilcart-api.fly.dev/api/products` -> returns list of all live approved products.
- Search matches: Title, brand, category, gender (Men, Women, Kids, Unisex).

### Brand Identity
Maithil Cart is stylized as two separate words: "Maithil Cart" (with a space) and serves as a premier hub for high quality traditional and modern ethnic wear alongside casual clothing.
